name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl and Sopi operator backend v5.59: fixes newly uploaded images showing unknown resolution. handleUpdateProduct writes the image row up to three times (initial save, then re-asserts after the Weimi round-trip), and the later re-asserts called setProductImage without the source dimensions, nulling the value that the first write had recorded. All setProductImage call sites that write a fresh image now pass srcW/srcH, so uploads record their source resolution immediately. Cumulative over v5.58.
